topStories.description: Iran has reportedly developed a new uranium enrichment site at an underground complex in Isfahan, which was apparently badly damaged in attacks by the US and Israel on Iran's nuclear facilities last...

topStories.title: Strikes kill two PMF fighters in northern Iraq amid wider war, group says
topStories.description: Strikes come hours after pro-Iran armed group Kataib Hezbollah announces conditional suspension of US embassy attacks.

topStories.title: LA Knight Riders Unveil The Knight Riders Cricket Field At Fairplex In Pomona
topStories.description: In a historic milestone, the Knight Riders Group has announced its official home field for 2026, the Knight Riders Cricket Field, located at Fairplex in Pomona, California.

topStories.title: US East Asian allies in legal quandary as Trump seeks help in the Middle East
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump is expected to discuss the Strait of Hormuz with Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi.

topStories.title: Iran to ‘boycott’ World Cup in US but will not withdraw from 2026 event
topStories.description: Iran scheduled to play their three FIFA World Cup 2026 group games in United States, but Mexico is an alternative.

topStories.title: Snake venom case: Supreme Court quashes FIR, proceedings against YouTuber Elvish Yadav
topStories.description: The case against Elvish Yadav was registered on November 22, 2023, and he was arrested on March 17, 2024, for the alleged use of snake venom at a rave party in Noida, Uttar Pradesh.

topStories.title: Congress divided on Iran war with US-Israel? Manish Tewari, Shashi Tharoor back govt stance
topStories.description: Even as Rahul Gandhi slammed Narendra Modi-led government, his partymen - Tharoor and Tewari - support the centre's stand on the ongoing war in the middle east.

topStories.title: Pradyut Bordoloi’s son withdraws as Congress candidate
topStories.description: Prateek Bordoloi said his father’s decision to join the BJP made it inappropriate for him to continue as a Congress candidate, but reaffirmed his allegiance to Congress

topStories.title: DR Congo and Rwanda agree to ease tensions after talks in US
topStories.description: The conflict has persisted despite a peace deal signed by DR Congo and Rwanda in December.

topStories.title: Trump denies knowledge of Israeli gas field attack
topStories.description: Donald Trump said the US was unaware of Israel’s South Pars strike and warned Iran against targeting Qatar.

topStories.title: Brent crude spikes above $115/bbl after attacks on Mideast energy assets multiply
topStories.description: Oil prices saw a sharp rise Thursday. Brent crude reached over $115 a barrel. This followed Iran's attacks on energy facilities across the Middle East. Israel had previously struck Iran's South Pars gas field. These events mark a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict. The U.S. Federal Reserve maintained steady interest rates.

topStories.title: Supreme Court seeks fresh HC hearing after convict flags unfair 20-year bail and reduced prison term
topStories.description: Supreme Court says the case is one of “give him an inch and he will ask for a mile”

dailyNews.title: Iran war: What’s the Jones Act, and why has Trump suspended it for 60 days?
dailyNews.description: The move allows foreign-flagged vessels to transport goods between US ports for the next 60 days.

dailyNews.title: US weighs sending thousands of troops to region as Iran war rages: Report
dailyNews.description: The deployments could help provide Trump with additional options but would further entrench US in a foreign war.

dailyNews.title: Assam polls: BJP releases list of 88 nominees; ex-Cong leaders among contestants
dailyNews.description: Veteran lawmaker Atul Bora, who has been denied a ticket, said he could contest as an independent or support the Congress candidate from Dispur

dailyNews.title: Big relief for Big Boss winner Elvish Yadav as SC quashes proceedings
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court vs Elvish Yadav: The apex court has given verdict in case against the Youtuber Elvish Yadav. Find out what the court said and the details of the case in which he was chargesheeted.

dailyNews.title: Assam polls: BJP releases first list of 88 candidates, CM Sarma to contest from Jalukbari
dailyNews.description: According to the list, Bhupen Kumar Borah, who also joined the BJP recently after leaving the Congress, will contest from Bihpura seat.

dailyNews.title: Trump attempts to distance US from Israeli strikes on key Iranian gasfield
dailyNews.description: Questions raised over US knowledge of Israeli plans to attack key Iranian gasfield as energy sites become targets.

dailyNews.title: Assam polls: Son quits as Congress candidate after Pradyut Bordoloi joins BJP
dailyNews.description: Prateek Bordoloi, the Congress’s candidate from Margherita, expressed faith in the Congress’s ideals, and said he will continue to work for it

dailyNews.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 20 of US-Israel attacks?
dailyNews.description: The Iran war enters day 20 as Israeli and Iranian attacks hit energy infrastructure across region.

dailyNews.title: BJP fields new joinee Pradyut Bordoloi from Dispur, CM Himanta from Jalukbari in first Assam election candidate list
dailyNews.description: Bordoloi, MP from Nagaon, on Wednesday joined the BJP in the presence of chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma, a day after resigning from the Congress.

dailyNews.title: Team USA star Kaillie Humphries rips Newsom for response to alleged California fraud, raises Olympic concerns
dailyNews.description: Kaillie Humphries warns about alleged California fraud ahead of 2028 LA Olympics, citing concerns about financial accountability and Governor Gavin Newsom's leadership.

dailyNews.title: New poll finds Americans likely to see each other as ‘morally bad’ — but expert says strong families can help
dailyNews.description: New Pew Research survey reveals 53% of Americans view fellow citizens as morally bad, the highest among 25 countries surveyed worldwide.

dailyNews.title: One daily habit may help you fight stress and think more clearly, study suggests
dailyNews.description: Science confirms the Wim Hof Method reduces stress and boosts energy through cold exposure therapy and breathwork. Wim Hof and study author Dr. Jemma King discuss.

topStories.title: Fetterman says Democrats lack leader, claims party driven by Trump Derangement Syndrome
topStories.description: Democratic Sen. John Fetterman, an ardent supporter of Israel who also backs the U.S. attack against Iran, suggested that his party is lead by Trump Derangement Syndrome.

topStories.title: 'Tell me to my face': Top moments in Mullin's heated confirmation hearing to be Trump's next DHS chief
topStories.description: Fireworks erupted during Sen. Markwayne Mullin's, R-Okla., confirmation hearing with Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., emerging as a potential key Democratic vote.

topStories.title: Trump continues to push for release of Tina Peters as Colorado governor weighs clemency
topStories.description: President Donald Trump continues to pressure Colorado's governor to free Tina Peters, who is serving a nine-year sentence for a security breach of voting systems.

topStories.title: What’s a Threat? Gabbard Says It’s Up to Trump, on Iran and Elsewhere.
topStories.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the director of national intelligence, was left to square the president’s comments about an imminent nuclear threat from Iran with a letter from one of her trusted aides.

topStories.title: Trump Says U.S. and Qatar Not Involved in Strike on Iran’s South Pars Gas Field
topStories.description: President Trump said Israel was responsible for the attack, but vowed to “massively” destroy the gas field if Tehran hit Qatar’s energy facilities in retaliation.

topStories.title: ‘Go Big and Go Loud’: Inside the Justice Dept.’s Push to Prosecute Protesters
topStories.description: Prosecutors have struggled to prove in court what the president and his aides have repeatedly said in public: that a network of leftist activists presents a serious threat to national security.

topStories.title: Trump Vowed to Crack Down on Fraudsters, but He’s Pardoned Dozens
topStories.description: Across both of his terms, President Trump has granted clemency to more than 70 allies, donors and others convicted in fraud cases.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Planning for America’s 250th Emphasizes Religion’s Role in the Nation’s Founding
dailyNews.description: A closed-door White House event included news about the National Garden of American Heroes and an emphasis on the role of religion in the founding.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to "blow up" huge Iranian gas field if Iran attacks Qatar
dailyNews.description: Trump says the U.S. will destroy a vast Iranian gas field if Tehran retaliates for an Israeli strike on the facility by attacking Qatar's infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: What to know about Joe Kent, Trump counterterrorism chief who resigned
dailyNews.description: In a resignation letter, Joe Kent said Iran "posed no imminent threat to our nation," and he asserted that "we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby."

dailyNews.title: 2/27: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Jeffrey Epstein ties spark investigations and resignations; New York City Mayor Mamdani and President Trump talk housing in second White House meeting.

dailyNews.title: 2/26: The Takeout: The Iran Question
dailyNews.description: In a special edition of "The Takeout," Major Garrett speaks with experts about escalating tensions over Iran's nuclear program and the potential political consequences of U.S. intervention as President Trump considers strikes if no deal is reached.

dailyNews.title: FBI conducting leak investigation into former Trump official who resigned over Iran war
dailyNews.description: A source told NBC News that the probe began before Joe Kent, a longtime Trump ally, announced his resignation as director of the National Counterterrorism Center.

dailyNews.title: Some DHS contractors told White House officials they were asked to pay Corey Lewandowski
dailyNews.description: Some companies complained to the Trump administration that Lewandowski has stood to personally profit from the DHS contracting process. Lewandowski denies the allegations.

dailyNews.title: Chair Jerome Powell has 'no intention of leaving' the Fed until DOJ probe is closed
dailyNews.description: Fed Chair Jerome Powell says he will not step down from the central bank's board until an investigation launched by President Trump's Justice Dept. is closed.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns will 'blow up' South Pars gas field in Iran if strikes against Qatar energy continue
dailyNews.description: World leaders are scrambling to contain a spiraling Middle East conflict on Thursday after Israel and Iran traded strikes on gas production facilities.

dailyNews.title: Vice President Vance to meet with oil industry as White House plans more actions to address fuel prices
dailyNews.description: Consumers are seeing fuel prices rapidly rise as the Iran war has triggered the biggest oil supply disruption in history.

dailyNews.title: Trump waives Jones Act shipping rules for 60 days to steady oil market
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration "remains committed to continuing to strengthen our critical supply chains" amid the Iran war, press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
